Glimmora

#0969 Glimmet #0971 Greavard
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Glimmora is a Rock/Poison type Pokémon introduced in Generation 9.

Evolution of Glimmet.

Glimmora Mega Glimmora

Pokédex data

National № 0970
Type Rock Poison
Species Ore Pokémon
Height 1.5 m (4′11″)
Weight 45.0 kg (99.2 lbs)
Abilities 1. Toxic Debris
Corrosion (hidden ability)
Local № 0309 (Scarlet/Violet)
0157 (The Teal Mask)
0021 (Mega Dimension)

Training

EV yield 2 Sp. Atk
Catch rate 25 (3.3% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 184
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Mineral
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 30 (7,454–7,710 steps)

Evolution chart

#0969
Glimmet
Rock · Poison
(Level 35)
#0970
Glimmora
Rock · Poison

Pokédex entries

Scarlet When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
Violet Glimmora’s petals are made of crystallized poison energy. It has recently become evident that these petals resemble Tera Jewels.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Name origin

glimmer
shine, gleam
flora
relating to plants
